final:
// // When S is HIGH, X reflects the value of A0; when S is LOW, X outputs the value of A1.
module top_module(
    input wire A0,
    input wire A1,
    input wire S,
    output reg X
);always @(*) begin
    if (S == 1'b0) begin
        X = A0;
    end else begin
        X = A1;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // When S is HIGH, X reflects the value of A0; when S is LOW, X outputs the value of A1.
